title: Process Engineer (Manufacturing - Edible Oil)
description:
• MNC
  • Working Location : Woodlands (Company Transport Provided)
  • Basic: $ 3200 to $ 4800 + AWS + VB
  • Excellent Benefits + Career Progression
  • Process Manufacturing Plant
  • TRAINING PROVIDED – for candidate with lesser experience

Job Responsibilities:

  • Troubleshooting of production process and initiate process improvement activities.
  • Work closely with Plant Manager to ensure smooth implementation of project(s) assigned.
  • Co-ordinate with Plant Manager in the maintenance of respective plant equipment.
  • Ensure smooth and safe operation in Plant operations.
  • Training of operational staff.
  • Investigate, identify and implement corrective actions to recurrent deviations from process norm.
  • Initiate and recommend improvement to plant process.
  • Plan and ensure proper implementation of plant maintenance activities.
  • Liaise with external vendors and contractors where necessary.
  • Assist the Plant Manager to re-verify the integrity after the maintenance of equipment.
  • Perform regular plant safety inspection.
  • Execute Deputy Factory Manager's instruction in the implementation of a special project.
  • Issue and approve the permit to work systems.
  • Conduct training to operational staff as per the department's training program.
  • Ensure that all risk assessments in the workplace are established, implemented, monitored, communicated and documented according to WSH (Risk Management) requirements.
  • Any other duties assigned by Deputy Factory Manager

Requirements

  • Degree in Mechanical / Chemical Process or equivalent
  • 1 to 2 years of experience in Process Manufacturing Industry
  • Training will be provided for candidate with lesser experiences

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
